message:
🌱 Add Claude Code permissions for read-only commands

Auto-allow common read-only bash commands to reduce prompts:
- Git operations (status, diff, log, branch, remote, show)
- GitHub CLI (gh pr, run, issue, repo, api)
- Kubernetes/OpenShift (oc/kubectl get, describe, logs)
- Go tooling (build, test, mod, vet, govulncheck)
- Common inspection tools (ls, tree, head, tail, curl, jq)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@
+{
+  "permissions": {
+    "allow": [
+      "Bash(git status:*)",
+      "Bash(git diff:*)",
+      "Bash(git log:*)",
+      "Bash(git branch:*)",
+      "Bash(git remote:*)",
+      "Bash(git show:*)",
+      "Bash(gh pr:*)",
+      "Bash(gh run:*)",
+      "Bash(gh issue:*)",
+      "Bash(gh repo:*)",
+      "Bash(gh api:*)",
+      "Bash(oc get:*)",
+      "Bash(oc describe:*)",
+      "Bash(oc logs:*)",
+      "Bash(oc whoami:*)",
+      "Bash(oc project:*)",
+      "Bash(kubectl get:*)",
+      "Bash(kubectl describe:*)",
+      "Bash(kubectl logs:*)",
+      "Bash(ls:*)",
+      "Bash(pwd:*)",
+      "Bash(which:*)",
+      "Bash(tree:*)",
+      "Bash(head:*)",
+      "Bash(tail:*)",
+      "Bash(wc:*)",
+      "Bash(unset GITHUB_TOKEN:*)",
+      "Bash(go build:*)",
+      "Bash(go test:*)",
+      "Bash(go mod:*)",
+      "Bash(go vet:*)",
+      "Bash(go list:*)",
+      "Bash(govulncheck:*)",
+      "Bash(make:*)",
+      "Bash(helm list:*)",
+      "Bash(helm status:*)",
+      "Bash(helm get:*)",
+      "Bash(docker images:*)",
+      "Bash(docker ps:*)",
+      "Bash(podman images:*)",
+      "Bash(podman ps:*)",
+      "Bash(curl:*)",
+      "Bash(jq:*)"
+    ]
+  }
+}
